description.value: Price +1,000 gp; Aura faint transmutation; CL 1st; Weight â DESCRIPTION Requirement: This ability can only be placed on composite bows. An adaptive bow responds to the strength of its wielder, acting as a bow with a strength rating equal to its wielder’s Strength bonus. The wielder can fire it with a lesser Strength bonus (and cause less damage) if desired. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells warp wood; Cost +500 gp
